notes: The game is slow to load, but it's just as slow in Windows. Let the game launch with no tweaks at all, or the single player loading screen will run forever. I have not gotten this past the character creation dialog with proton 3, but it loaded right up with 4.
title: Outlaws of the Old West

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: Ran the game at low settings, fullscreen and changed to 720p. This resulted in playable framerates between 30-40fps. No major issues. I did no other tweaks beside DRI_PRIME=1 on the launch options to force my dGPU.
title: Outlaws of the Old West

notes:
Performance not as good as windows and you may get a weird issue where the game will never totally fullscreen 100% and it'll shave off the bottom ~5% of the image (You can see you desktop/whatever window you have open behind the game).

Other than that everything else worked for me
title: Outlaws of the Old West

notes: Plays well, average is around 44fps, with all settings on HIGH.  Only issue appears to be a lot of microstutter.  There are lag spikes galore at times, yet that appears to be the game itself, as I play on a server with others, all Win Users, and they get the same lag spikes.  Only other thing I have seen, is when you get disconnected from the server, due to a unanounced server restart, the game exits with a Win error.  Would put gold, but followed the info for "Silver" rating.  FYI no Anti-Cheat for game as of yet, so beware.
title: Outlaws of the Old West
